title: Argon Tableware Black Round Serving Tray 40cm - Reusable Non Slip Rubberized Surface Platter for Food and Drinks - Durable Heat Resistant Stackable Tray for Bars, Restaurants, Cafes and Home Use
features: 🍽️ Non-Slip Grip for Secure Serving - The Argon Tableware 40cm round serving tray features a textured rubber surface for maximum grip, keeping plates, glasses, and cutlery steady while serving food and drinks safely at home or in restaurants.

🔥 Heat-Resistant & Ideal for Hot Foods - Designed with heat-resistant properties, this durable tray allows safe transport of hot and cold dishes. Perfect for professional kitchens, bars, cafés, or at-home entertaining and catering events.

🧺 Space-Saving Stackable Storage - Its stackable design ensures convenient, compact storage, saving space in your kitchen, bar, or dining area. Perfect for restaurants and catering setups that need efficiency and organisation.

💪 Professional-Grade Durability - Crafted for long-lasting performance, this reusable tray meets the demands of commercial and home use. Ideal for waiters, servers, and hosts seeking a dependable non-slip serving tray solution.

✨ Dishwasher-Safe & Available in Multiple Sizes - Easy to clean and maintain, this black serving tray is dishwasher-safe and available in several sizes, including the 40cm diameter with a 2cm rim for secure serving.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to piñatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! Serving Trays By Argon Tableware Perfect for home use as well as professional pubs, bars and restaurants, this range of Non-Slip Serving Trays from Argon Tableware allows you to transport both food and drink from kitchen to dining table with confidence. The real selling point of this tray is the rubber surface on top, which offers exceptional resistance against slipping! If you're in the business of food and drink, the Argon Tableware range of Non-Slip Serving Trays is a must-have.
